Package com.wip.controller

Class ShipmentUiController

java.lang.Object
com.wip.controller.ShipmentUiController
@Controller @RequestMapping("/shipments") public class ShipmentUiController extends Object
Thymeleaf UI controller for managing shipments in the Courier Tracking System.

Handles browser-facing HTTP requests under the /shipments path and renders server-side HTML views via Thymeleaf. This controller covers the complete shipment lifecycle — listing all shipments, initiating new shipments from a parcel, displaying shipment details, editing, and deleting shipment records.

Duplicate-shipment handling: if a shipment already exists for a parcel (detected via IllegalStateException thrown by the service), the controller gracefully looks up the existing shipment and redirects the user to its detail page rather than showing a raw error.

Page flow overview:

  • GET /shipments → shipment/list — all shipments
  • GET /shipments/new → shipment/form — blank creation form
  • POST /shipments/save → redirect to details or re-render form on error
  • GET /shipments/by-parcel/{parcelId} → shipment/start — start-shipment confirmation page
  • POST /shipments/start/{parcelId} → redirect to details or back to confirmation on error
  • GET /shipments/{id} → shipment/details — single shipment view
  • GET /shipments/{id}/edit → shipment/form — pre-filled edit form
  • POST /shipments/{id}/update → redirect to details or re-render form on error
  • POST /shipments/{id}/delete → redirect to list or back to details on error
Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Dharshan K S (dharshan.ks@wipro.com)

  • Constructor Details

    • ShipmentUiController

      public ShipmentUiController(ShipmentService shipmentService, ParcelService parcelService)
      Constructs a ShipmentUiController with the required service dependencies.
      Parameters:
      shipmentService - the service bean responsible for shipment business logic; injected by Spring's dependency injection container
      parcelService - the service bean used to retrieve parcel data for the shipment confirmation page

  • Method Details

    • listShipments

      @GetMapping public String listShipments(org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Displays the list of all shipments in the system.

      Fetches every shipment record and adds it to the model as a shipments attribute before rendering the list view.

      Parameters:
      model - the Spring MVC Model used to pass the shipments attribute (a list of ShipmentDto) to the view
      Returns:
      the logical view name "shipment/list"

    • showCreateForm

      @GetMapping("/new") public String showCreateForm(org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Displays a blank form for creating a new shipment.

      Adds an empty ShipmentDto and the current date to the model to support form binding and date-picker defaults in the Thymeleaf template.

      Parameters:
      model - the Spring MVC Model; receives shipmentDto (an empty ShipmentDto) and today (LocalDate) attributes
      Returns:
      the logical view name "shipment/form"

    • saveShipment

      @PostMapping("/save") public String saveShipment(@ModelAttribute("shipmentDto") ShipmentDto shipmentDto, org.springframework.ui.Model model, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes redirectAttributes)
      Processes the submission of the new shipment creation form and initiates the shipment.

      Delegates to the service layer using the parcel ID bound in the submitted ShipmentDto. If an IllegalStateException is thrown (indicating a shipment already exists for this parcel), the controller attempts to locate the existing shipment and redirect to its detail page. If the parcel is not found, an appropriate error message is set and the form is re-rendered.

      Parameters:
      shipmentDto - the form-bound shipment data; only parcelId is used by the service to initiate the shipment
      model - the Spring MVC Model used to pass error messages and the today date attribute back to the view
      redirectAttributes - Spring MVC redirect attribute container used to carry flash messages across the redirect boundary
      Returns:
      a redirect to /shipments/{id} on success; or the logical view name "shipment/form" when an error occurs

    • showStartShipmentPage

      @GetMapping("/by-parcel/{parcelId}") public String showStartShipmentPage(@PathVariable Long parcelId, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Shows a confirmation page before starting a shipment from the parcel details view.

      Loads the parcel identified by parcelId and checks whether a shipment already exists for it. If an existing shipment is found, shipmentAlreadyExists is set to true and the existing shipment details are included in the model so that the view can render an appropriate message or redirect link. If the parcel is not found, the error/not-found view is rendered.

      Parameters:
      parcelId - the unique identifier of the parcel for which shipment creation is being considered
      model - the Spring MVC Model; receives parcel, parcelId, shipmentAlreadyExists, and optionally existingShipment attributes
      Returns:
      the logical view name "shipment/start" on success; "error/not-found" if the parcel does not exist; or "error/general" for unexpected errors

    • createShipmentFromParcel

      @PostMapping("/start/{parcelId}") public String createShipmentFromParcel(@PathVariable Long parcelId, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes redirectAttributes)
      Handles the POST request when an admin confirms shipment creation from the confirmation page.

      Creates a new shipment for the parcel identified by parcelId. If a shipment already exists (service throws IllegalStateException), the controller attempts to locate the existing shipment and redirects the user to its detail page with an informational flash message. Any other exception redirects back to the confirmation page with an error flash message.

      Parameters:
      parcelId - the unique identifier of the parcel for which the shipment is to be started
      redirectAttributes - Spring MVC redirect attribute container used to carry flash messages across the redirect boundary
      Returns:
      a redirect to /shipments/{id} on success; a redirect to the existing shipment's detail page if one already exists; or a redirect back to /shipments/by-parcel/{parcelId} on other errors

    • shipmentDetails

      @GetMapping("/{id}") public String shipmentDetails(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Displays the detail view for a single shipment identified by its ID.

      Fetches the shipment by id and adds it as a shipment model attribute for rendering. If the shipment does not exist, the service layer propagates a ResourceNotFoundException.

      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the shipment to display
      model - the Spring MVC Model; receives the shipment attribute (a ShipmentDto) for rendering
      Returns:
      the logical view name "shipment/details"
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if no shipment exists with the given ID

    • editShipmentForm

      @GetMapping("/{id}/edit") public String editShipmentForm(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Displays a pre-populated form for editing an existing shipment.

      Loads the current shipment data by id and binds it to the shipmentDto model attribute so that existing field values appear pre-filled in the Thymeleaf form. The current date is also provided.

      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the shipment to be edited
      model - the Spring MVC Model; receives shipmentDto (pre-filled ShipmentDto) and today (LocalDate) attributes
      Returns:
      the logical view name "shipment/form"
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if no shipment exists with the given ID

    • updateShipment

      @PostMapping("/{id}/update") public String updateShipment(@PathVariable Long id, @Valid @ModelAttribute("shipmentDto") @Valid ShipmentDto shipmentDto, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Processes the submission of the shipment edit form and persists the updated details.

      Validates the submitted ShipmentDto via Bean Validation. On validation failure, the form is re-rendered with inline error messages. On success, the user is redirected to the shipment's detail page. Business-rule violations (e.g. invalid status transition) are caught as IllegalStateException and surfaced with a descriptive error message.

      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the shipment being updated
      shipmentDto - the form-bound updated shipment data; must satisfy Bean Validation constraints
      bindingResult - holds validation errors produced during binding and validation
      model - the Spring MVC Model used to pass error messages and the today date attribute back to the view
      Returns:
      a redirect to /shipments/{id} on success, or the logical view name "shipment/form" when validation or persistence fails

    • deleteShipment

      @PostMapping("/{id}/delete") public String deleteShipment(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes redirectAttributes)
      Handles the deletion of a shipment and redirects appropriately.

      Attempts to delete the shipment identified by id. On success, a flash attribute successMessage is added and the user is redirected to the shipment list. If a business rule prevents deletion (service throws IllegalStateException, e.g. shipment is in an active state), the user is redirected back to the shipment's detail page with an error flash message. Any other exception also redirects to the shipment list with a generic error message.

      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the shipment to delete
      redirectAttributes - Spring MVC redirect attribute container used to carry flash messages across the redirect boundary
      Returns:
      a redirect to /shipments on success or generic error; or a redirect to /shipments/{id} when a business-rule violation prevents deletion
